skills.name: Clear Pipe Cleanly
skills.summary: game=super_mario | skill=Clear Pipe Cleanly | effects=clear_completed | context=use when approaching a pipe while moving right; jump over or onto the pipe, avoid nearby Goombas, and preserve momentum to continue safely
skills.description: Run through a clear pipe smoothly by entering at full speed and staying aligned so Mario doesn’t bump or lose momentum. Use it when a transparent pipe bridges a gap or leads past enemies to keep the r

skills.name: Hit Question Blocks
skills.summary: game=super_mario | skill=hit_question_blocks | effects=collect_completed | context=use when a nearby overhead question block appears while moving right; jump to hit it and collect before continuing
skills.description: Jump underneath question-mark blocks in Super Mario to hit them with Mario’s head and release their item or coins. Use this when a block is directly above Mario or reachable from a nearby platform.

skills.name: Stomp Under Block
skills.summary: game=super_mario | skill=Stomp Under Block | effects=defend_completed | context=use when defending against a Goomba beneath a low overhead block; time a safe jump to stomp without hitting the block
skills.description: Jump up from directly beneath a question block or brick to hit it from below, making the block bounce and knocking out or disabling enemies standing on top. Use this when a Goomba or Koopa is walking

skills.name: Move Right Safely
skills.summary: game=super_mario | skill=Move Right Safely | effects=navigate_completed | context=advance right without jumping, line up beneath the nearer question block, stay safe as the Goomba approaches, continue under the block cluster
skills.description: Move Mario to the right while staying grounded and avoiding nearby hazards or bad jumps. Use this in the opening stretch or any safe lane to advance toward question blocks, enemies, and the next scree

skills.name: Move Under Block
skills.summary: game=super_mario | skill=Move Under Block | effects=position_completed | context=move right to align directly beneath the shifted question block for an upcoming jump without jumping yet
skills.description: Move Mario so he is directly underneath a question block, lining up his position before jumping to hit it. Use this in the opening area when a nearby block is above Mario and slightly ahead.
